{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shadow Icon
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Shadow]] [[Icon]] is a conceptual symbol or power that represents specific ideals and defines an individual's path. It has been associated with the core principles of a mother's [[life]] and is linked to the spirit of the [[Netherworld Empress]]. In terms of its manifestation, it can appear as a symbol or be reflected through the depth of [[shadow madra]]. The [[Icon]] is part of a broader group of similar entities, which also include the [[Strength]], [[Bow]], and Crown [[Icons]].}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Shadow Icon]] is more connected to [[Fate]] than [[Northstrider]]'s means.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has command of the [[Shadow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Attacks from [[Malice]] carry echoes of the [[Shadow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shadow Icon]] is reflected in the spirit of the [[Netherworld Empress]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shadow Icon]] was one of the ideals [[Malice]] strove for.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
